stimulus: To stop invasive zebra mussels from spreading through interconnected lakes, ecologist Mara Lindstrom has suggested that a series of filtration stations be installed along the Hudson River’s connecting channels. The stations would trap mussel larvae and ______blank a barrier that few other aquatic organisms would be harmed by.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The modal “would” should be followed by the bare infinitive (plain) form of the verb. “Create” is the bare infinitive that correctly completes the coordinate verb phrase with “trap.”

Choice A is a present tense conjugated form; Choices C and D are non-finite participles. None can serve as the verb following “would.”
